warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
The fukui-reactivity analysis on formaldehyde was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier `standard`). The calculation was done in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The input geometry was provided from the user's `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` file. Partial charges were calculated using the Mulliken scheme.

The most electrophilic site is the Carbon atom (C, atom 2) with a Fukui f+ index of 0.70839.
The most nucleophilic site is the Oxygen atom (O, atom 1) with a Fukui f- index of 0.46742.
